'''Ann Sachs''' (born [[January 23]], [[1940s#1948|1948]]) is an actress, writer, business owner and theatre specialist. She voiced [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia]] in all three [[Star Wars radio dramas|radio adaptations of the original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].<ref name="Audiosphere">{{InsiderCite|201|Adventures in the Audiosphere}}</ref>

Sachs worked as a professional actress, mostly on the stage, beginning in 1969. In 1992 she co-founded a design company, Sachs Morgan Studio, with her husband, working as president and CEO until the end of 2012. Later she served for a time as vice president of the board of directors of the Ensemble Studio Theatre in New York.<ref name="About" /> 

{{Bio-stub}}
